title: Bare Bones x Iron Chests
description: Replace those default textures from the famous Iron Chests mod with a Bare Bones style ones.
body:
This texture pack modifies the [Iron Chests mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests) textures to fit the Bare Bones aesthetic, while maintaining coherence with the original block textures. 

If you want a complete Bare Bones experience for all blocks, consider using the [official Bare Bones texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) in combination.
